name: MHD ITI-65 Scenario on ITB
summary: Test the capacity of the system to receive MHD DocumentReference and to respond to query/retrieve transactions.
description:
Execute MHD ITI-65 Scenario
[Arguments] ${BUNDLE_FILE} ${SERVER_URL}

GIVEN a test context is initialized with bundle, server and mode ${BUNDLE_FILE} ${SERVER_URL}
AND a Patient Resource exists on the Server
WHEN Client sends a valid MHD ITI-65 transaction bundle for that patient to the Server
THEN the server shall return HTTP response code 201 created
AND the response bundle shall contain the DocumentReference
AND a Get for the DocumentReference with resource.id shall return the submitted DocumentReference
AND a GET for the referenced document shall return the document.

steps.name: Executing test case SingleDocument on ITB
